en-US.summary: Real-time Pikud HaOref rocket and missile alerts for your Alexa devices
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Pikud Alert for status
Alexa, ask Pikud Alert when was the last alert
en-US.name: Pikud Alert
en-US.description: Get real-time Pikud HaOref (Israel Home Front Command) alerts on your Alexa devices. Supports rocket/missile alerts, early warnings, hostile aircraft intrusions, and all-clear notifications.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Enable the skill and say Alexa open Pikud Alert.
